title: Looking for Category Manager at Rapido

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Rapido
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
